# TerraSkin

> Premium skincare products for healthy, radiant skin.

TerraSkin combines natural ingredients with science-backed formulations to create effective, gentle skincare solutions.

## Core Pages

- [Shop All](https://terraskin.in/shop): Full collection of natural serums, moisturisers, and cleansers.
- [About Us](https://terraskin.in/about): The journey of TerraSkin and our commitment to natural beauty.
- [Contact](https://terraskin.in/contact): Skincare advice and order support.
- [Privacy Policy](https://terraskin.in/privacy): Our commitment to data protection.

## Brand Values

- **Quality First**: No compromise on ingredients or formulations.
- **Science-Backed**: Dermatologist-tested and clinically approved.
- **Natural & Gentle**: Effective solutions that work with your skin.
- **Cruelty-Free**: 100% ethically sourced and never tested on animals.
